name: handout
description: Build, personalize, publish, and analyze Handout sales sites with an agent.

interface.shortDescription: Build and personalize sales sites with your agent
interface.longDescription: Handout gives your agent a safe, first-class workflow for building polished sales sites, editing pages, creating recipient-specific copies, publishing with approval, and turning engagement into follow-up actions.
defaultPrompt: Build a polished sales site for this opportunity.
Personalize this site for my account list.
